items.title: TAV Havalimanları Holding A.Ş. Financial Calendar for Q1 2025
items.content:
TAV Havalimanları Holding A.Ş. announced the financial calendar for the first quarter of 2025. The financial reports for the period 01.01.2025 - 31.03.2025 are planned to be disclosed to the public on April 24, 2025.

This announcement outlines the date on which TAV Havalimanları Holding A.Ş. intends to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. Specifically, the financial reports covering the period from January 1, 2025, to March 31, 2025, are scheduled for public disclosure on April 24, 2025. The document provides a timeline for the release of these financial statements, offering transparency to investors and stakeholders regarding the company's financial performance.
